title: selaginella sinensis
intro: Selaginella sinensis, also known as Chinese spikenard or rucou, is a type of plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family, commonly referred to as resurrection ferns due to their ability to survive in dry conditions. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella sinensis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Selaginella sinensis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a treatment for various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
